name: Anna Theriot
subtitle: plaintiff's counsel · Boutte Street practice

ultimate_ability.label: The Supplemental Disclosure
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game. Enter a piece of evidence into the record that opposing counsel cannot object to: bypass the standard OBJECT counter this turn. Erica reads it. What is on the paper is now on the record.

notes: Anna's hand for the Justice arcana. WEIGHT is the second stat (renamed AWKWARDNESS / EXHAUSTION per scenario). Scenarios: motion_to_dismiss (canonical), chambers_at_nine (easier friendship), post_decision_review (hardest readiness conference).
